# truenas_kerberos_realm (Data Source)

Provides information about a Kerberos realm on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_kerberos_realm" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "realm" {
  value = data.truenas_kerberos_realm.example.realm
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric realm ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `admin_server` (List of String) Admin servers.
- `kdc` (List of String) KDC servers.
- `kpasswd_server` (List of String) kpasswd servers.
- `primary_kdc` (String) Primary KDC server.
- `realm` (String) The realm name.
